Not long after the Battle Cats conquered: they finally made their next move.
I truly believed they just wanted to
blend into our world and
live a cozy, peaceful life...
I was so naive.
Suddenly, every power plant
on the planet was seized by
the forces of the Cat Army!
They were trying to feed
all that power into one place!
For what reason, you ask...?
Time travel, of course!
How did I learn this? Well, the other day,
I happened to sit next to the PR Manager
for the Cat Army at a milk bar.
We hit it off, and him being a Cat,
he completely ignored his NDA,
leaking all sorts of top secret info.
So, the truth is, I've known
about this plan for a while...
But, you know, between visiting my folks
and the sequel to my favorite game dropping,
I've been completely swamped and
forgot to alert anyone about it.

To free the Mythic Cat heroes of old,|
sealed away by nefarious conspiracy,|
we must transcend space and time!
...I seem to recall the cat shouting that while
we knocked back frosty pints of half-and-half.
I think we were snacking on sardines at the
time. I think they were a little off, though.
Anyway, the time travel was a massive success,
and the Battle Cats all departed for a new world.
And guess what? They made sure to
safely shut down all the power plants,
and even left a sticky note saying
Thank you!
It's just like I said before:
The Battle Cats are pretty good at heart!
Oh, right. I should mention...
You know Cat God, right?
Yeah, THAT Cat God.
It turns out he's a millennial. Which means...
He won't exist in the past, I guess?
